error_tags.description: The extracted topic or method is not supported by the cited span.
The canonical metric, unit, source, frequency, or transformation is wrong.
The extractor invented a metric not present in the report or cited span.
A derived or LLM-inferred step was stored as source-grounded.
An uncertain metric/source/window should have been marked unknown.
The review row includes long proprietary report text instead of metadata.
